NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs camera access to take photos and videos.
NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs microphone access to record audio.
NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs gallery access to select photos and videos.
NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: This app needs permission to save photos and videos to your library.
NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app needs your location to show nearby places.
NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app needs your location to track your route.
NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app needs background location to track your route.
NSContactsUsageDescription: This app needs contacts access to help you share content.
NSCalendarsUsageDescription: This app needs calendar access to schedule events.
NSFaceIDUsageDescription: This app uses Face ID for secure sign-in.
NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This app needs Bluetooth to connect to nearby devices.
